sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
paragraphs: Looking for a quick answer? This page covers some of the most common questions about Game Of Darts.
If you can't find what you're looking for here, explore the other guides or get in touch for further support.

faq.question: Is Game Of Darts available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Yes. Game Of Darts is available to download from the App Store using the link on this website.

faq.question: Which game modes are included?
faq.answer: Game Of Darts currently includes X01 Match Play, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s, with more modes planned for future updates.

faq.question: Can I play against DartBot?
faq.answer: Yes. DartBot is the built-in AI opponent and is available with the Pro upgrade, the dedicated DartBot unlock, or the 48-Hour Pass.

faq.question: Do I need Game Center for achievements and leaderboards?
faq.answer: Yes. Sign in to Apple Game Center to unlock achievements, submit leaderboard scores, and track your progress.

faq.question: How do premium features work?
faq.answer: Premium features can be unlocked with the Pro upgrade, the dedicated DartBot unlock, or a 48-Hour Pass, depending on the features you want to access.

faq.question: Why do some pages use the same artwork?
faq.answer: Some guide pages currently use shared artwork while dedicated screenshots continue to be added in future updates.
